title_original: QURECA, EdenBase and QCentroid have announced a partnership as part of EdenBase's QBase ecosystem initiative - Qureca
summary_original: QURECA, EdenBase, and QCentroid have partnered to launch an executive-level quantum training program as part of EdenBase’s QBase ecosystem initiative in London. The program, delivered by QURECA and supported by Northeastern University London, targets senior decision-makers and investors in sectors such as finance, energy, and healthcare. It features a four-hour, in-person workshop at QBase, focusing on sector-specific use cases and hands-on proof-of-concept experiments using QCentroid’s QuantumOps platform. Dr. Araceli Venegas-Gomez of QURECA highlighted the company’s global reputation in quantum education, while Eric Van der Kleij of EdenBase and Carlos Kuchkovsky of QCentroid emphasized the move from theoretical learning to practical implementation.
